justification: The issue describes a problem with `np.linspace` producing unevenly spaced arrays when using `np.float32`, which is unexpected behavior.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed but was marked as a question. It references previous issues that are still open, suggesting ongoing investigation.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
